problems_encountered.description: Cannot create mail address without a valid domain. Tool requires an email address with a domain that is configured in the project.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed due to missing prerequisites. No domains available for email address creation.
execution_notes: Mail addresses require a domain (e.g., user@domain.com). Since no domains exist in test projects, this eval cannot be completed. Would need to add a domain to the project first.
